name: camp_office
_comment_spawn: User 2026-06-12 PR#4: PP stood too high entering the office (feet 750, floating against the door/radiator line). spawnY 480 -> 505 drops his feet to ~775 on the open floor in front of the rug.
_comment_walkY: 2026-06-15 #2/#3: the office had no walk-Y range (min/max 0 → defaults 265-395). That let PP walk UP toward Higgins until his 270px body-box rose into the top wall blocker (y0-360), which shoved him back to the entrance and fired a false 'arrival' (needed a 2nd click), and kept his feet floating high off the floor. Pin the walkable band to the actual floor strip (foot 690-790) so PP stays below the wall blocker and stands on the floor in front of the desk.

blockers._comment: User 2026-06-12 PR#4: block the radiator/door corner (278,588)-(409,689) so PP can't walk into it.
